risk_description: User creating suppliers and running payments can pay fictitious suppliers.
User entering invoices and running payments can create fraudulent payments.
User creating suppliers and entering invoices can fabricate relationships.
User approving invoices and running payments bypasses payment controls.
User creating and cancelling invoices can manipulate AP balances.
User creating customers and reviewing credit can extend inappropriate credit.
User creating customers and posting receipts can fabricate transactions.
User creating invoices and adjusting balances can manipulate receivables.
User posting journals and closing periods can post to closed periods.
User posting and reversing journals can manipulate financial records.
User managing COA and posting can create hidden accounts.
User creating POs and receiving inventory can fabricate procurement.
User creating suppliers and POs can set up fictitious supply chains.
User creating and approving POs bypasses segregation.
User cancelling and creating POs can cycle orders to manipulate commitments.
User receiving and counting can conceal inventory discrepancies.
User managing locations and issuing can route stock to unauthorized areas.
User creating employees and running payroll can create ghost employees.
User running payroll and voiding payments can divert funds.
User managing org and creating employees can place people in unauthorized structures.
User adding and transferring assets can misappropriate company property.
User creating orders and confirming shipment can ship unauthorized goods.
User managing users and responsibilities can grant unlimited access.
User entering and approving QA results can bypass quality controls.
User creating and completing work orders can fabricate production output.
